name: Reincarnation of the Unchained
desc: When this card is activated: You can add 1 "Unchained" Spell (except "Reincarnation of the Unchained") or 1 "Abomination's Prison" from your Deck to your hand. Once per turn: You can target up to 3 "Unchained" cards in your GY, except "Reincarnation of the Unchained"; shuffle them into the Deck, then you can destroy other cards you control up to the number shuffled. You can only activate 1 "Reincarnation of the Unchained" per turn.
